title: ophrys holosericea subsp. elatior
intro: Ophrys holosericea subsp. elatior is a subspecies of orchid, commonly known as the bee orchid, a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, due to its flavonoid and alkaloid content. The health benefits of Ophrys holosericea subsp. elatior include its potential to act as an antispasmodic, helping to relax muscles and reduce inflammation, as well as its possible antioxidant properties. Ophrys holosericea subsp. elatior can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
